name: button-with-icon
visual_summary: A button component that displays an icon, often used to trigger an action or navigate between screens. It's commonly used in applications where a straightforward call-to-action is needed.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: button-with-icon
Description: A button component that displays an icon, often used to trigger an action or navigate between screens. It's commonly used in applications where a straightforward call-to-action is needed.
Style: material-design, flat, rounded
Interactions: clickable, disabled, hover
Tags: button, ui, icon, call-to-action, navigation

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
